recent_developments.headline: U.S. export controls restrict advanced-GPU sales to China
recent_developments.so_what: Caps a material slice of data-center demand and can be tightened further — a key risk to growth durability.

recent_developments.headline: Revenue concentrated in a few hyperscaler customers
recent_developments.so_what: A handful of buyers drive most data-center revenue; demand could be lumpy or pulled forward.

recent_developments.headline: Rising competition: AMD GPUs and hyperscaler custom ASICs (TPU, Trainium)
recent_developments.so_what: Threatens long-run pricing power and the CUDA moat at the margin.

recent_developments.headline: Next-generation (Blackwell) product ramp underway
recent_developments.so_what: Supports forward growth but adds execution and supply-chain risk.
